abilities.name: Infernal Burst
abilities.rawDescription: Rounds 3, 6, 9: deal Fire Damage to 3 Enemies in any lane (Damage Rate +100%). If Caraxes has First-Strike, damage is multiplied by 1.5 and displayed as +150%.

conditionalMultipliers.description: If Caraxes has First-Strike, damage is multiplied by 1.5.

notes: Mitigated by target Initiative.

abilities.name: Hunter's Wrath
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard, increase Caraxes Fire Damage Dealt by 16%. Increase Strength and Initiative of Right Flank ally by +20.

abilities.name: Battle Dread
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: reduce Strength and Initiative of 3 Enemies in any lane by -6%, enhanced by Caraxes Intelligence. Progression table shows -6.5% at Level 1.

notes: Raw description appears to state -6%; ranked table displays -6.5% at Level 1. Structured values use the ranked table.
Raw description appears to state -6%; ranked table displays -6.5% at Level 1. Structured values use the ranked table.

abilities.name: Dragon's Flair
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: increase Caraxes Fire Damage Dealt until end of combat.

abilities.name: Crippling Inferno
abilities.rawDescription: Each Round: chance to apply Slow and Burn to 3 Enemies in any lane. Each effect is checked separately for each target and lasts 2 rounds.

notes: Slow causes the target to attack after all other combatants each round.
Burn deals Fire Damage each round and is mitigated by target Initiative.

abilities.name: Mass Enfeeble
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: reduce Physical Damage Dealt, excluding Basic Attacks, of 3 Enemies in any lane by -5%. Progression table shows -5.5% at Level 1.

notes: Raw description appears to state -5%; ranked table displays -5.5% at Level 1. Structured values use the ranked table.

abilities.name: Blood Wyrm
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Each Round: for each Enemy below 50% maximum Troop Capacity, increase Caraxes Fire Damage Dealt. For each Enemy that retreated during the previous round, apply Recovery to Caraxes, enhanced by Initiative.

notes: Caraxes command, trait, affinities, observation state, and five Habits were normalized from screenshot evidence.
Crippling Inferno stores Slow and Burn as independently checked per target.
Battle Dread and Mass Enfeeble preserve the visible text/table discrepancy.
Observation values are account-specific and not canonical base stats.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription: Rounds 3, 6, 9: deal Fire Damage to 3 Enemies in any lane (Damage Rate +100%). If Caraxes has First-Strike, damage is multiplied by 1.5 and displayed as +150%.
At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard, increase Caraxes Fire Damage Dealt by 16%. Increase Strength and Initiative of Right Flank ally by +20.
Start of Combat: reduce Strength and Initiative of 3 Enemies in any lane by -6%, enhanced by Caraxes Intelligence. Progression table shows -6.5% at Level 1.
Start of Combat: increase Caraxes Fire Damage Dealt until end of combat.
Each Round: chance to apply Slow and Burn to 3 Enemies in any lane. Each effect is checked separately for each target and lasts 2 rounds.
Start of Combat: reduce Physical Damage Dealt, excluding Basic Attacks, of 3 Enemies in any lane by -5%. Progression table shows -5.5% at Level 1.

Start of Each Round: for each Enemy below 50% maximum Troop Capacity, increase Caraxes Fire Damage Dealt. For each Enemy that retreated during the previous round, apply Recovery to Caraxes, enhanced by Initiative.
